_comment: Tracks the shadcn-svelte version the vendored primitives (./ui/**) were last reconciled against. scripts/check-shadcn-updates.mjs compares `version` to the npm-latest weekly (advisory only) and flags updates for review. Bump `version` ONLY after re-adding + reviewing the changed primitives — see docs/kit/guide/07-shadcn-upstream-sync.md.
